name: Plane Starship2:Galactic Contender
short_description: This is a 4x turn-base strategy game. You can develop your planet, expand your territory by colonizing and building space stations, research technology to unlock more ships, and ultimately discover and eliminate your enemies.
detailed_description:
《Plane Starship2:Galactic Contender》 is a 4x turn-base strategy game. Players can both develop your country overall, or command every detail in battle.

Game Feature


  • Three different factions with its own mechanism.
  • Each faction has dozens of unique ships
  • You can use research to unlock powerful flagship in the later of game, and use it to come back!
  • There are three types of ship weapons: energy, kinetic and missiles, each with a unique mechanism.
  • Kinetic weapons have inertia and will continue moving for some turns after fire.
  • If missile does not hit a target immediately, it will become a unit, which can be commanded freely by the player
  • Both movement and attack require energy. Each ship has an energy storage limit.
  • Supply ships have more energy storage limits and can supply energy for other ships.
  • After building the space station, you can build constructions on it, to turn it into an industrial center, supply point, or a powerful firepower platform.
